title: Ubiquiti UniFi AP U7-Pro
description: Ubiquiti U7 Pro is a new tri-band access point. It connects to the network using a regular LAN port with speeds up to 2.5 Gbps . The wireless frequencies are 2.4 GHz with a speed of 688 Mbps , 5 GHz with a speed of 2880 Mbps , and the 6 GHz band with a speed of 5760 Mbps . The access point is powered by PoE+ protocol, and its maximum power consumption is 21 W . It provides Internet connectivity for more than 300 devices at the same time High speed up to 5760 Mbps in the 6 GHz band Power over PoE+ Connectivity for more than 300 devices simultaneously Device Wall/ceiling mounting kit
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 + 6 GHz (triple band) WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac, 802.11b/g, 802.11ax, 802.11be MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 2880 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 688 Transmission speed - 6GHz [Mb/s] 5760 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 22 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 26 Tx power 6GHz [dBm] 23 Security WPA-PSK, WPA-Enterprise (WPA/WPA2/WPA3) 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 6GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Built-in Internal antennas 6 Roaming Yes Antenna gain [dBi] 6, 4 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 100/1000/2500Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3at PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 21 Physical characteristics Purpose Indoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 30 up to 60 Weight [g] 680 Width [mm] 206 Height [mm] 46 Depth [mm] 206
